posts.author: Anjali Reddy
posts.body: We just closed our first enterprise pilot with a Vijayawada bank using the District Legal Desk template. 11 days end-to-end. Genuinely faster than my Bangalore lawyer.

posts.author: District 01 Office
posts.body: Notice 014/2026: 30% capex rebate extended to AI x Gov sub-category. Eligibility window opens 01 Apr.

posts.author: Karthik Iyer
posts.body: Hosting an AMA Friday on India-out: how Amaravati incorporation actually compares to Delaware C-Corp + Singapore. Dropping a one-pager in #policy.

posts.author: Wei Lin
posts.body: New founder, Quantum Valley Cohort. Building privacy-first identity infra. Looking for two AP-based engineers who care about cryptography. DMs open.

posts.author: Priya Nair
posts.body: Coworking floor 3 has the best afternoon light in the entire district. Trying to convince myself this is a productivity tip.

posts.author: Aditya Rao
posts.body: Quantum Valley Cohort kickoff dinner this Saturday at District Mess. Confirmed 38 founders, 6 partners, 4 LPs. Bring your one-pager.

posts.author: Department of IT, AP
posts.body: Founder Visa fast-track lane is now operational. Average processing: 9 days. Apply via Tools → Founder visa support.
